title: Blackout Revival Tech
description: A mod based on the Roblox game Blackout Revival: Killzone
body:
## THERES A NEW AND UPDATED VERSION OF THE MOD HERE: https://modrinth.com/mod/blackout-revival-tech-reborn

**THIS MOD IS FULLY BASED OF THE GAME BLACKOUT REVIVAL MOST TEXTURES/MODELS/ETC ARE BASED OF BLACKOUT REVIVAL AND (SOME SOUND DESIGN IS FROM THE GAME BLACKOUT REVIVAL.)-_To be removed since it goes against the games terms_ IM ALSO NOT AFFILIATED WITH THE DEVELOPERS OF BLACKOUT REVIVAL**

Neoforge and forge only.
This mod was made using Mcreator

This mod is still in early development and will recieve updates every now and then.
This mod adds Items, Armors, Mobs, and more, from the game Blackout Revival: Killzone on roblox. These Items and armors have special functionality unlike base weapons and armors in minecraft. An example could be: Full Operator armor gives you the ability to double jump, (not only that). This mod contains 5 Weapons, and 4 Armor Sets.

Next Major update Goals:
- IMPORTANT. Remove sounds from game and create custom ones...
- Lower the cooldown on power jump, and power slide.
- Finish the darn mod
